title: Side Street Story
writer: Eduardo De Filippo, Dino Maiuri, Piero Tellini
actors: Eduardo De Filippo, Delia Scala, Leda Gloria
plot: A combination of a satire on war and a comedy with war as the background. It tells of the ordinary people living on a Naples sidestreet from 1940 to 1950 under the dominance of the Fascists, the Nazis, then the Allies occupation f...
